module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent modules for remoc-backed frontdoor Session/Task endpoints, a session-scoped LoopEngine with configured model backend state, public Plan/Job/TaskStep shapes, ModelRequest step purpose, and ModelResponse content/failure results.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Session-scoped loop engine interfaces: LoopEngine loads Config, owns backend state, creates/runs TaskContext values, publishes TaskRuntimeEvent notifications, exposes Plan/Job/TaskStep shapes, builds the initial model TaskStep internally, and runs private run_model_loop.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor Session and Task endpoints backed by remoc/TCP, accepting client tasks into LoopEngine, keeping SessionEvent narrow, routing cancellation, and drafting TaskEvent response/complete sending.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Model request interface, ModelContext data, backend implementation boundary, model errors, and Deepseek streaming backend where ModelRequest carries ModelTaskStepKind and ModelResponse yields content chunks or failures.
